name: Zone Stalker
description: A STALKER-themed gameplay overhaul inspired by the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone.  You are a Stalker operating from a secret underground laboratory, using experimental spatial anomaly technology to conduct expeditions into the dangerous Zone.  Hunt for artifacts, complete faction missions, and survive the Zone's deadly anomalies.  Death isn't permanent - the lab's anomalous field will reconstruct you, but you'll lose your gear.  Build your stash, upgrade your equipment, and become a legendary Stalker.  Note: 'PLAY NOW' will NOT work, you MUST make a custom character.
